description: The foundational questions of knowledge, value, reasoning, and existence.

EMP.name: Ethics & Moral Philosophy
EMP.description: Normative ethics, metaethics, applied ethics — bioethics, AI ethics, business ethics

LOG.name: Logic & Epistemology
LOG.description: Formal logic, argumentation, knowledge theory, scientific method, rationality

PPH.name: Political Philosophy
PPH.description: Justice, rights, social contract, legitimacy, liberty, equality — the theoretical foundations

MND.name: Philosophy of Mind
MND.description: Consciousness, personal identity, free will, mind-body problem, cognitive science intersection

PHI.name: History of Philosophy
PHI.description: Major philosophers and schools — Plato to Kant to contemporary analytic and continental

source_requirements.exception_classics: Pre-1950 classical philosophical works are exempt from recency caps

notes: This domain is uniquely self-referential for OpenEyes — the Philosophy Guard's own rules encode philosophical positions. The EMP sector fragments provide the theoretical foundation for the guard's domain rules across all other domains. Build EMP first within this domain for that reason.
